evals.prompt: Use pi-computer-use to inspect the current frontmost controllable macOS window. Call screenshot first. Pass only if semantic AX state is returned; do not click or type.

Discover the TextEdit window without assuming it is already selected. Call list_apps, then list_windows for TextEdit, then screenshot the TextEdit window by its window ref. Do not type or edit anything.

In the current TextEdit document, use screenshot to find the editable text area, then use set_text with the AX ref to replace the document contents exactly with: pi-computer-use model eval set_text 49217. Finish only after a refresh confirms the text is present.

In the current TextEdit document, call screenshot, then use one computer_actions batch to set the document contents to exactly: pi-computer-use model eval batch 68304. The batch should use the AX text ref if available. Finish after the latest returned state confirms the text is present.

In the current TextEdit document, call screenshot, focus the editable text target, then use type_text to insert exactly: pi-computer-use model eval raw insertion 73591. Do not use set_text for this eval. Refresh or wait afterward and pass only if the inserted text is visible in returned state.

In the current TextEdit document, use screenshot and set_text to set the contents exactly to: pi-computer-use model eval wait 81026. Then call wait to refresh the state and confirm the text. Finish only after wait returns the latest semantic state.
